name: APPYEA, INC
summary: PART I Corporate History General AppYea, Inc. (AppYea, the Company, we or us) was incorporated in the State of South Dakota on November 26, 2012 to engage in the acquisition, purchase, maintenance and creation of mobile software applications. The Company is in the development stage with no significant revenues and no operating history. On November 1, 2021 the Company was redomiciled in the State of Nevada.
